description.value: [Source: GB19] A challenging drug to refine, fairytale triggers soothing hallucinations, which the user can project into the minds of others or conjure into reality as flitting lights. DETAIL Type injury (injected); Addiction moderate, Fortitude DC 18; Price 800 gp EFFECT 2 hours; +2 alchemical bonus to Will saves against magic effects and a â2 penalty to Perception checks. During this time, gain dancing lights , deep slumber , and wisp ally as spell-like abilities (CL 9th), each usable once. DAMAGE 1d4 Charisma damage
